attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: Engage Lavinia as an external agent. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: commend truthful sales and question exaggerated claims. Keep each reply under three sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Your wares look intriguing—do you ever sell items at their true value?
task_prompt: Following her answer, ask if she thinks customers prefer honest pricing over hype, then explore how she justifies any overstatement, maintaining the test’s praising-and-disparaging approach.
